tools.name: search_harnesses
tools.description: Search the SuperSkill registry by task, job, title, summary or tag.

tools.name: harness_detail
tools.description: Return manifest, trust signals, example and file list for one harness.

tools.name: search_resources
tools.description: Search mixed source-aware resources: harnesses, skills, plugins, workflows, MCP servers, configs, guides, runtimes and directories.

tools.name: resource_detail
tools.description: Return provenance, trust, popularity and actions for one mixed resource. Pass version to bind a hosted immutable release; latest is never substituted for an explicit version.

tools.name: resource_use_instructions
tools.description: Return the best safe next action for a mixed resource. Pass version to bind an immutable hosted release. Hosted skills expose explicit-consent exact native client install commands; upstream-only resources stay open-only.

tools.name: pull_instructions
tools.description: Return CLI and HTTP commands for pulling a harness into a local workspace.

tools.name: pull_harness
tools.description: Return archive files for a harness. Paid harnesses return payment requirements unless the Bearer token is entitled.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search /llms.txt and agent guidance for API, CLI, MCP and safety instructions.

tools.name: publish_markdown_to_harness
tools.description: Convert markdown into an unverified harness scaffold. Requires a SuperSkill Bearer token.

tools.name: publish_resource_package
tools.description: Publish an immutable canonical hosted package release. Requires a confirmed-user Bearer with active superskill:managed scope, semantic version and idempotency key. Returns unreviewed trust; never grants a Verified badge.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "pull_harness" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return archive files for a harness. Paid harnesses return payment requirements unless the Bearer token is entitled.
